---
title: "Analysing clean_filtered"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-25"
---

The clean_filtered.h5ad file was from Abu's workflow for the scRNAseq data for the atopic dermatitis project. This is the current working file for the singlecell data.

adata = AnnData - conventional variable name for Python single cell data

### Loading the File

```{r}
install.packages("reticulate")
library(reticulate)

# Check which Python is being used
py_config()

# Install scanpy in that Python
py_install("scanpy")

# Then use it
sc <- import("scanpy")
adata <- sc$read_h5ad("/Users/maisievarcoe/Desktop/clean filtered.h5ad")               
print(adata)

list.files("/Users/maisievarcoe/Desktop/Research Project/Data/")
```

```{r}

import scanpy as sc
adata = sc.read_h5ad("file.h5ad")
print(adata)
```
